use_cases: Schedule and manage appointments across days, weeks, or months
Track and visualize time blocks for events and tasks
Enable date selection for booking systems and forms
Display availability and busy times for multiple users or resources
Organize recurring events and maintain calendar views
ai_summary: A comprehensive calendar planner component for scheduling, time blocking, and event management. Supports multiple view modes with keyboard navigation and click-to-select interactions. Ideal for SaaS dashboards, healthcare appointment systems, and any application requiring calendar-based data visualization.
